content: Words are, in my not humble opinion, our inexhaustible source of magic, capable of hurting and healing.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by LeeSooHa (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: kzj:Iti nopo boos, nung maan ku tamaai do mamalati', nga' iso koimazaan di potihombus, i kaanu do popoluo om nogi' mongumbasi'
